infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Teller uses your location to recommend nearby restaurants and dishes that fit your taste.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Teller uses the camera so you can scan physical menus and get dish recommendations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Teller uses your photos so you can upload menu screenshots for dish recommendations.
